'''kadhovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabaka|kabaka]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabaka|kabaka]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kadhovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kædheveth|kædheveth]] || [[word:kædhevej|kædhevej]] || [[word:kædhevesh|kædhevesh]] || [[word:kædheve|kædheve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadhodhovoth|kadhodhovoth]] || [[word:kadhodhovoj|kadhodhovoj]] || [[word:kadhodhovosh|kadhodhovosh]] || [[word:kadhodhovo|kadhodhovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadhovoth|kadhovoth]] || [[word:kadhovoj|kadhovoj]] || [[word:kadhovosh|kadhovosh]] || [[word:kadhovo|kadhovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadhofvoth|kadhofvoth]] || [[word:kadhofvoj|kadhofvoj]] || [[word:kadhofvosh|kadhofvosh]] || [[word:kadhofvof|kadhofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kadhovotho|kadhovotho]] || [[word:kadhovojo|kadhovojo]] || [[word:kadhovosho|kadhovosho]] || [[word:kadhovoko|kadhovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kadhovoth|kadhovoth]] || [[word:kadhovoj|kadhovoj]] || [[word:kadhovosh|kadhovosh]] || [[word:kadhovo|kadhovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kadhovothol|kadhovothol]] || [[word:kadhovojol|kadhovojol]] || [[word:kadhovoshol|kadhovoshol]] || [[word:kadhovokol|kadhovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kadhovothotho|kadhovothotho]] || [[word:kadhovojojo|kadhovojojo]] || [[word:kadhovoshosho|kadhovoshosho]] || [[word:kadhovoko|kadhovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kadhovothon|kadhovothon]] || [[word:kadhovojon|kadhovojon]] || [[word:kadhovoshon|kadhovoshon]] || [[word:kadhovokon|kadhovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kadhovothoro|kadhovothoro]] || [[word:kadhovojoro|kadhovojoro]] || [[word:kadhovoshoro|kadhovoshoro]] || [[word:kadhovokoro|kadhovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
